feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: In OPD transaction, I'm trying to find the email recipient table in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm inside the window when we open the transaction OPD and I'd like to find the tables that contains the email recipient list.

I see the table RES_T_DEC_TAB_EMAIL_RECEIVER_1 in OPD but I'm unable to find it in SAP S4

My goal is to schedule an extraction from this table.

Is there a way to find the tables inside S4 or its stored somewhere else ?

See screencaptures for more infos.

 ---Steps to Reproduce ---

  1. Open OPD transaction
  2. Select Sales Document and Determination Step: Email Recipient
  3. Try to find the table where this data is stored

Thanks!

entry.title: "Send ERP Delivery Messages" PPF is not executing from EWM to ERP post Goods receipt
entry.content:
Hello,

We are setting up the Decentralized EWM system (2309) and trying to create our 1st Inbound Delivery in EWM. Inbound Delivery has been created in ERP and distributed to EWM. We have done Goods receipt in EWM and the PPF "Send ERP Delivery messages" is in yellow status and have not executed it. Why it has not executed automatically even though settings are in placed

Also when we try to reprocess it, it is giving time out dump.

Can anyone provide any advice on this?

entry.title: Activate the Sales Order Header field VBAK-KNUMA in VA01 and VA02 transactions
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

    I need to activate the Sales Order Header field VBAK-KNUMA in VA01 and VA02 transactions so that it becomes available for update. The field shows in VA03 though and in VA02 in display mode only. In VA01 its not available at all. Hence, any update using IDOC is not possible even when we pass the correct qualifier. I tried doing it using the transaction SHD0, but I was unable to find the field for the screen variants for SAPMV45A. Any suggestions for achieving it would be really helpful.

Thanks for your help in advance.

Regards

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: Notification to My Inbox Tile in S/4 Private Edition based on Condition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!!

How to get notification in My Inbox Tile in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition based on condition?

For Example : A Purchase order got created with Amount 3 Lakhs. so here requirement is to get notification in My Inbox Tile if amount of PO is more that 2 lakhs.

Thanks in Advance

Regards,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: S/4HANA service - requote a service quation with reference to maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have some issue with new service s/4hana.

In new S/4HANA service with Advanced Execution we have an Service Quotation (SQ) 4000000184.

SQ has a two main items.

  • 10) Execution item  - this item generates maintenance order, where a costs are calculated.
    • 13) spare part
    • 16) work hours
  • 20) Expanse item 

SQ 4000000184:

10) execution item has reference to maintenance order  4000803

 

The next step, after the customer accepted the SQ,  the system generate follow-up document - Service order

Until now everything is ok.

But when we want a requote SQ(4000000184),  system creates a new SQ (4000000185), but wihout reference to maintenace order. So subitems are missing.

 

SQ 4000000185

Execetion order item - item. no. 10 doesn't have any reference to maintenance order.

 

 

 

Is this a normal state?  Or do you have any workaround for that? Because price details doesn't work properly without subitems. The New SQ (4000000185) should have a reference to maintenance order 4000803.

 

Tested on S/4HANA 2023 FPS01.

 

Thanks you for your help.

Vojta

entry.title: How to read SAP routing information from production order
entry.content:
Hi 
I want to get details of tasks list group and group counter of routing

I am using these API but i don't find any interrelated property to connect production order and production routing 

API i am using
production order API : https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV_0001/path/get_A_ProductionOrder_2
Production routing : https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING_0001/path/get_ProductionRoutingHeader_ProductionRoutingGroup___ProductionRoutingGroup___ProductionRouting___ProductionRouting___ProductionRoutingInternalVers___ProductionRoutingInternalVers___

And how to get this values for routing API from production order
ProductionRoutingGroup
ProductionRouting
ProductionRoutingInternalVers


Thank you,
Onkar Gavali

entry.title: SAP Cloud Print Manager with SAP S/4HANA on-premises - Business user as print user
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4HANA on-premises and recently decided to install SAP Cloud Print Manager since it is now compatible with on-premises installations of S/4HANA.

In addition, we use the centralized printing system "Uniflow" (Canon) which allows the end users to start a print from S/4 and to decide afterwards on which printer the document will be printed by using their badge to "authenticate" them at the printer.

We would like to keep this mechanism with SAP S/4HANA on-premises and the SAP Cloud Print Manager. Therefore, we need that business users are used by the SAP Cloud Print Manager as print user to send the print to the Uniflow server and not a technical user.

Is there any working configuration that we can use to implement a solution ?

entry.title: Can the amounts generated by WOCO be linked to individual Billing Documents?
entry.content: My client has requested that the Rebate amounts listed on the report be linked to Billing Documents so the total can be broken down my Billing Document.  Can this be configured or will it require special coding?

entry.title: Brazil Tax Reform - NF-e Technical Note 2024.002 and DF-e Technical Note 2024.001
entry.content:
Customer would like to know when SAP intends to provide more technical details about Brazil Tax Reform. According to the customer, Brazil Government has issued Technical Notes and customer needs to understand the impacts in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to set the default view to object currency in CJ30
Inspection lot number range status doesn't change
entry.content:
Hello!
I have an issue with inspection lot numbers.
We changed number range status "10000070900" for number range No. "01" via QA09 t-code.
The screenshot is available on the attachments. ("QA09 current.png")
After changing the number range status I tried to create some inspection lots.
You can see inspection lots' images, too. ("Inspection lots.png")
So, the inspections' numbers didn't occur as expected. Also, number range status didn't change after creating inspection lots.
I would want to mention that, I changed it 2 times. Unfortunately, the number range status doesn't perceive the latest version and don't change automatically.

We hope somebody had the same issue.
I look forward your solving ideas for this problem.

Thanks for attention.
Kindly regards.

entry.title: Minimum required SAP Kernel Patchlevel for SLES 15 (SP 6)
entry.content:
Dear community,

for AIX 7.3 I found a nice list of minimum required SAP Kernel patchlevels in SAP note 1780629. Now I'm looking for something similar for SLES 15 (SP6). I already know the PAM information, but that's quite basic. I know the SAP notes 2369910 and 2578899 as well - but they don't give information about SAP Kernel PLs...

Is there any SAP note or the like which could provide such information for SLES 15 (SP6)?

Thanks & regards, Marie

entry.title: Adaptation Project Replace Odata In BAS?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone 

yesterday, we changed the odata with the option "Replace Odata" but when i change in the adaptation project.

the application continue look for the firts entity of the standard odata.

the app is F3302, The entity is C_GRIRAccountReconciliation.

how must to do?

In the adaptation project there are two options, add or replace the odata, we chose the second option, however it seems that the main entity is always called or there is something missing in SAPUI5 Project.

thank you for your helping.

entry.title: Method to download Flexible workflow from FIORI(similar to CL30N in GUI)
entry.content:
In "Manage Workflows" app, is there a way to download the existing scenarios(similar to CL30N in FUI)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Post debit to specific G/L account upon goods receipt
entry.content:
Hi experts,
In the PO pricing procedure I'm using a condition type (ZCOS) to record a surcharge cost. As this cost might or not occur, the condition type is set as "Manual", "Condition Category" is empty and it does not have an "Access Sequence".
The surcharge cost must be posted in a specific G/L cost account (712001).

Imagine the following scenario:
- PO where we are buying 10 units of material XPTO ( PBSG 10 EUR);
- Surcharge cost (ZCOS) of 5 EUR it's added to the PO

My goal is to have the following postings when doing the goods receipt of the PO:
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 105 EUR
DEBIT - Surcharge account 712001: 5 EUR

As you can see, I expect the surcharge cost to be credited in GR/IR and debited in our G/L account 712001.

Unfortunatelly, until now I was not able to get it and I tried different configurations like:

# Configuration 1 #
Condition Type ZCOS | Cond.Class: A, Calc.Type: B, Cond.Categ.: "", Accruals checkbox not ticked
Pricing Procedure | ZCOS with "Statistical" not ticked, having an "Account Key" that in OBYC points to 712001, "Accrual Key" empty

# Result of Config.1 #
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 105 EUR
DEBIT - Purch.Price Variance: 5 EUR

As you can see the debit of the surcharge cost went to Price Variance account instead of our account 712001

# Configuration 2 #
Same as configuration 1 with only one difference, Condition Type ZCOS with Cond.Category "B" (delivery costs)

# Result of Config.2 #
Exactly the same as Config.1

# Configuration 3 #
Condition Type ZCOS | Cond.Class: A, Calc.Type: B, Cond.Categ.: "", Accruals ticked
Pricing Procedure | ZCOS with "Statistical" not ticked, having an "Accrual Key" that in OBYC points to 712001

# Result of Config.3 #
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 100 EUR
DEBIT - Purch.Price Variance: 5 EUR
CREDIT - Surcharge 712001: 5 EUR

With this I now have 712001 being posted but as a CREDIT and I want a DEBIT. Also GR/IR is not being impacted.
We need to see something like this:
DEBIT - Inventory: 100 EUR
CREDIT - GR/IR: 105 EUR
DEBIT - Surcharge account 712001: 5 EUR

Can you help me on this?
Thanks

entry.title: Install S4HANA 2023 - Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I has issue when installed S4HANA 2023 and HANA Database in one host.

Kindly please your advice.

Detail issue on below, and please find the attachment.

An error occurred while processing option SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Instance S4H/D10 reached state STOP after having state STARTING. Giving up). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

R3trans -d
This is R3trans version 6.27 (release 793 - 12.06.24 - 09:07:06).
unicode enabled version
R3trans finished (0000).

entry.title: RRI jump option for the CDS Analytics Queries
entry.content:
Hi , 

we are in S/4HANA (BW 7.56) and using CDS based queries.

I 'm trying to implement a RRI between 2 queries but not able to do achieve it so far.

I have implemented all RRI relevant snotes in the system.

And defined the RRI for a CDS based query on RSBBS transaction.  

and mapped the fields between 2 reports. 

But after RRI setting I'm not able to see jump option on RSRT. I have also tried same in AFO and SAC, also not able to see it there. 

Do you know if I miss anything. Or is it not possible to set up an RRI  between 2 CDS queries ? 

Thanks 

Erkan

entry.title: SAP MDG: How to make enable custom entity grey items in - Create Customer Search (HANA) ?
entry.content:
Hi 

Facing issue in choosing field grey check while create search view for Customer Search (HANA)

 

Thank You, 
Sowmya Surekha.

entry.title: Custom List entity using REUSE mode in sap MDG-S?
entry.content:
We have requirement to add Custom list entity using Reuse mode in MDG-S. we have the data mode extensions, genil Extensions and SMT mapping and brought Custom ENTITY in MDG UI. 

 

Issue is : - when we entered the data inside the custom entity UIBB. once Change request is Activated then data which we entered in the UIBB is getting Vanished and not getting updated in the Custom database table.

 

Kindly Help with Solution and Links.

 

Thanks in Advance

best Answer will be Rewarded.

entry.title: Single dunning letter for multiple company codes at same dunning level
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Requirement is to print all open items on single dunning notice from multiple company codes which has same level of dunning level.

Given i have maintained all the required cross-company code configuration, still system is printing separate dunning letters for each company code at same dunning level. If anyone can suggest, will be great help. 

Thank you.
